====Pokémon==== This listing is of Bea's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}: =====On hand===== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Grapploct |type1=Fighting |img=Bea Grapploct.png |epnum=JN034 |epname=Solitary and Menacing! |vajp=Noriaki Kanze |vaen=James Weaver Clark |desc={{p|Grapploct}} is Bea's first known Pokémon. It was first used in her battle against the Karate Master and won after defeating his {{p|Hitmonchan}}. Grapploct then was Bea's second Pokémon in her [[World Coronation Series]] battle against {{Ash}}, where it went up against his {{AP|Riolu}}. Despite Riolu putting up a good fight, Grapploct won with relative ease. In ''[[JN039|Octo-Gridlock at the Gym!]]'', Grapploct battled [[Chuck]]'s {{p|Poliwrath}} before Ash arrived to have a [[rematch]] against Bea. It was the second Pokémon Bea used after {{p|Hitmontop}} lost to {{AP|Pikachu}}. Grapploct was able to defeat Pikachu before battling Riolu, with the match coming to a draw. In ''[[JN085|Battle Three With Bea!]]'', Grapploct was the first Pokémon Bea used in her second rematch with Ash. It first went up against Pikachu, who was soon switched out for {{AP|Lucario}} after both sides inflicted damage on each other. After a while, Grapploct was recalled and replaced with {{p|Hawlucha}}. In ''[[JN086|A Battle of Mega Versus Max!]]'', Grapploct was sent out to battle Pikachu, managing to defeat him before being defeated by Lucario. Grapploct's known moves are {{m|Detect}}, {{m|Close Combat}}, {{m|Liquidation}}, and {{m|Octolock}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Hawlucha |type1=Fighting |type2=Flying |img=Bea Hawlucha.png |epnum=JN034 |epname=Solitary and Menacing! |vajp=Ryota Iwasaki |vaen=H.D. Quinn |desc={{p|Hawlucha}} is Bea's second known Pokémon. She used it in her [[World Coronation Series]] battle against {{Ash}} in ''[[JN034|Solitary and Menacing]]'', where it went up against his {{AP|Farfetch'd}} and won. Afterwards, Hawlucha was recalled for {{p|Grapploct}}. In ''[[JN085|Battle Three With Bea!]]'', Hawlucha was the second Pokémon Bea used in her second rematch with Ash. It fought against his {{AP|Lucario}}, managing to inflict damage, but was soon switched out for {{p|Machamp}}. In ''[[JN086|A Battle of Mega Versus Max!]]'', Hawlucha was sent out to battle against {{AP|Sirfetch'd}}. Once again, it was able to defeat it, only to be beaten by {{AP|Pikachu}} afterwards. Hawlucha's known moves are {{m|Hone Claws}}, {{m|Karate Chop}}, {{m|Flying Press}}, {{m|High Jump Kick}}, {{m|Wing Attack}}, and {{m|Sky Attack}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Hitmontop |gender=male |type1=Fighting |img=Bea Hitmontop.png |epnum=JN034 |epname=Solitary and Menacing! |vajp=Kei Shindō |vaen= |desc={{p|Hitmontop}} is Bea's third known Pokémon. In ''[[JN039|Octo-Gridlock at the Gym!]]'', Bea used him as the first Pokémon in her rematch against Ash, where he went up against {{AP|Pikachu}}. Despite landing some damage, Hitmontop was eventually defeated. In ''[[JN085|Battle Three With Bea!]]'', Hitmontop was training alongside Bea's other Pokémon. During the encounter with Ash's Pokémon, Hitmontop ate some [[Poké Puff]]s alongside [[Ash's Dragonite]] and {{AP|Gengar}}. Hitmontop's known moves are {{m|Gyro Ball}}, {{m|Focus Energy}}, and {{m|Triple Kick}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Machamp |giga=yes |type1=Fighting |img=Bea Machamp.png |cap=Bea's Machamp |img2=Bea Machamp Gigantamax.png |cap2=Bea's Gigantamax Machamp |epnum=JN034 |epname=Solitary and Menacing! |vajp=Yasuhiro Mamiya |vaen= |desc={{p|Machamp}} first appeared in a flashback, along with Bea's other Pokémon. It is capable of [[Gigantamax]]ing. In ''[[JN085|Battle Three With Bea!]]'', Machamp was the third Pokémon Bea used in her second rematch with Ash, being sent out to battle his {{AP|Lucario}}, quickly gaining the upper hand. In ''[[JN086|A Battle of Mega Versus Max!]]'', Ash switched Lucario out for {{AP|Sirfetch'd}}, whom Machamp battled for a while before being recalled. Later, Machamp was sent out to battle Lucario again. Bea Gigantamaxed Machamp in response to Ash using [[Mega Evolution]]. Lucario was able to survive Gigantamax Machamp's attacks until it reverted to normal, soon after which Machamp was defeated, making Ash the winner of the match. In ''[[JN136|This Could be the Start of Something Big!]]'', Machamp was used in Bea's training battle against [[Hop]], where it went up against his {{p|Wooloo}}. Machamp's known moves are {{m|Bullet Punch}}, {{m|Cross Chop}}, and {{m|Strength}}.
As a Gigantamax Machamp, it can use {{m|Max Steelspike}}, {{m|Max Strike}}, and {{m|G-Max Chi Strike}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Pangoro |type1=fighting |type2=dark |img=Bea Pangoro.png |epnum=JN034 |epname=Solitary and Menacing! |vajp= |vaen= |desc={{p|Pangoro}} first appeared along with Bea's other Pokémon in a flashback. In ''[[JN085|Battle Three With Bea!]]'', Pangoro appeared training alongside Bea. During the meeting with Ash, Goh, and Korrina's Pokémon, Pangoro had a brief quarrel with [[Korrina's Lucario]]. None of Pangoro's moves are known.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Falinks |type1=Fighting |img=Bea Falinks.png |epnum=JN085 |epname=Battle Three With Bea! |vajp= |vaen= |desc={{p|Falinks}} appeared while training along with Bea's other Pokémon. None of Falinks's moves are known.}} =====Other===== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Fighting-type Pokémon |type1=Fighting |img=Bea Pokémon anime.png |epnum=JN034 |epname=Solitary and Menacing! |vajp= |vaen= |desc=Bea owns many {{type|Fighting}} {{OBP|Pokémon|species}}. Among them, she has {{p|Throh}}, {{p|Tyrogue}}, {{p|Scraggy}}, {{p|Machop}}, {{p|Machoke}}, and {{p|Sawk}}.}} =====Traveling with===== {| width="50%" |- | {{ActivePoké|||nick=Rotom Phone|Bea Rotom Phone.png|electric|ghost|link=Rotom Phone}} | | |}
